mentions.note: Real lender (18.8B loans, $3.8B revenue) but lumpy, credit-sensitive earnings (2021: $15.95/sh → 2022: $4.47 → 2023: $14.74 → 2024: $7.60 → 2025: $12.16). Lower-credit-score customer base (below 720 typical); 5.8% delinquency still elevated. Cheap at 8x forward but trap: looks cheapest before consumer weakens. Prefer Capital One, American Express, or Affirm.
